theme_and_archetype.description: A fusion of rich, warm library tones (mahogany, parchment) and high-energy retro arcade neon. Designed to celebrate African American literature and culture while maintaining a classic 8-bit/16-bit arcade runner feel.

screens.game_over: flex-col items-center justify-center bg-background-overlay backdrop-blur-sm z-50 absolute inset-0

hud.container: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between p-6 z-40

controls.touch_zones: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-[50vh] flex z-30

male_librarian.description: Warm brown skin tone sprite. Features a tapered fade or short locs, retro thick-rimmed glasses, a yellow argyle cardigan over a button-up shirt, and a bold red bowtie. Runs while pushing a golden vintage book cart.

female_librarian.description: Warm brown skin tone sprite. Features a glorious natural afro or neatly tied protective braids, cat-eye glasses, an emerald twinset sweater, and a flowing skirt. Carries a glowing stack of books that trail pixel-dust.

book_banners.description: Sinister, blocky book-shaped enemies in charred black and dark greys. They have glowing red, angry pixel eyes. Across their covers is a massive, pulsing pixelated 'BANNED' stamp in bright red. Some variants carry tiny pixel torches.
book_banners.defeat_animation: Squishes flat into a cloud of burnt paper particles before disappearing.

classic_literature.description: Glowing pixel-art books celebrating Black literature. They bob up and down and emit a golden/orange pixel aura. Visual cues: Dark Red cover ('Beloved'), Emerald Green ('Invisible Man'), Deep Yellow ('Their Eyes Were Watching God').
classic_literature.collect_animation: Bursts into tiny glowing stars/sparks with a crisp 8-bit 'chime' sound.

background_parallax.layer_1_far: Dark mahogany arches and gothic library architecture in deep shadows.
background_parallax.layer_2_mid: Endless rows of vintage bookshelves with colorful book spines. Subtle floating dust particles.
background_parallax.layer_3_near: Wooden card catalogs with brass handles and warm yellow reading lamps casting directional light.
background_parallax.layer_4_floor: Polished wooden floorboards with a subtle reflection of the running character.

ui_components.buttons: Chunky arcade-style boxes. 4px solid borders (color: #D4A373), inner shadow to simulate depth. On press, translate-y-1 and invert colors.
ui_components.panels: Dark brown background with 2px gold border, sharp corners. Inspired by old library signage.

animations.parallax_scroll: Continuous horizontal translation, speed multipliers: L1(0.1x), L2(0.4x), L3(0.7x), Floor(1.0x).
animations.ui_pulse: Score text and 'TAP TO START' pulse opacity from 100% to 50% every 1s.

audio_cues.game_over: Descending minor scale in square wave.

media_urls.description: Tall vintage bookshelves filled with books in a grand library.
Brown wooden bookshelf perfect for parallax layer 2.
High-resolution vintage parchment texture, ideal for UI panels and menus.
High-resolution tattered paper texture for game over or high score screens.
Close-up of three vintage hardbound books stacked, showing aged textures for collectible sprite reference.
Stack of vintage books with worn pages and soft lighting.

accessibility_and_testing.color_contrast: Ensure HUD text (#FFD700) over dark backgrounds maintains > 4.5:1 ratio. Add text shadow drop-shadow-[0_4px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)] to guarantee legibility over moving parallax layers.
